There is no internet in my room.
Good evening. I have a booking for a suite. Is there Wi-Fi in the room?
Yes, there is. It is complimentary. Here is your key card. Your room is on the fifth floor.
Thank you. Are there any restaurants in the hotel?
Sorry to bother you. There is not a towel in the bathroom, and the Wi-Fi is faulty.
I am so sorry. I will send housekeeping with towels, and a technician for the Wi-Fi.
Thank you so much. One more thing, could I have a late checkout? My flight is in the afternoon.
Are there any restaurants in the hotel?
There is no internet. The Wi-Fi is faulty.
Could I have a late checkout, please?

Good evening, and welcome to the Grand Park Hotel. My name is Tom, and I am at the reception tonight. Let me tell you about the hotel. There is free Wi-Fi in every room and in the lobby. There is a gym on the second floor, and there are two restaurants on the ground floor. Breakfast is from seven to ten in the morning. Housekeeping cleans the rooms every day. Your room is a suite on the fifth floor, with a city view. Here is your key card. If there is any problem with the room, just call the reception and we will help you right away. Enjoy your stay.

This is a quick voice note about the hotel. The room is nice, but there were a few small problems. First, there was no towel in the bathroom, so I called housekeeping and they brought some. Second, the Wi-Fi was faulty, so I told the reception there was no internet in my room, and a technician fixed it. I also asked for a late checkout because my flight is in the afternoon, and they said it was fine. The staff were very kind and the amenities are good. Tomorrow I will use the gym before I check out. In the end, I am happy with my stay.

First, Aline arrives at the hotel and checks in at the reception. Then she asks about the facilities and says, Is there Wi-Fi in the room? After that, she goes up to her suite and finds a problem: there is no towel in the bathroom. Next, she calls housekeeping and reports that the Wi-Fi is faulty. Finally, she asks for a late checkout and the staff fix everything.
